title: OpenAI Responses API Compatibility
description: SDK normalizes input items before sending to the OpenAI Responses API, stripping cross-provider incompatible fields and fake IDs generated internally.

actors.name: AgentRunner
actors.description: Internal SDK component that triggers model inference calls

actors.name: ExternalProvider
actors.description: Non-OpenAI provider (e.g., Gemini, Claude) that may have injected provider_data or fake IDs into items

actors.name: OpenAIResponsesAPI
actors.description: OpenAI Responses API endpoint that receives normalized requests

use_cases.name: Build Compatible API Request
use_cases.description: Orchestrates input normalization pipeline before creating the API request. Calls input_to_new_input_list → _to_dump_compatible → _remove_openai_responses_api_incompatible_fields.

use_cases.name: Remove Incompatible Fields from Input Items
use_cases.description: Scans all input items; if none have provider_data returns unchanged (early-exit optimization). Otherwise iterates and cleans each item.

use_cases.name: Filter Provider-Specific Reasoning Items
use_cases.description: Reasoning items (type='reasoning') that carry provider_data are dropped entirely — they are provider-specific and not understood by OpenAI.
use_cases.method: OpenAIResponsesModel._clean_item_for_openai() — returns None when type=='reasoning' and provider_data is truthy

use_cases.name: Strip Fake Response ID
use_cases.description: Items whose id equals FAKE_RESPONSES_ID ('__fake_id__') have the id field deleted. These are synthetic IDs generated by the SDK when no real ID is available (e.g., for non-OpenAI responses).

use_cases.name: Remove provider_data Field
use_cases.description: The provider_data field is removed from all dict items. This field holds provider-specific metadata (e.g., model name from Gemini/Claude) that OpenAI does not accept.

use_cases.name: Early-Exit When No Normalization Needed
use_cases.description: If no item in the list has a truthy provider_data field, the original list is returned as-is without copying or processing. Optimizes the common path when only OpenAI items are present.

use_cases.name: Preserve Real IDs
use_cases.description: Items with real (non-fake) IDs keep their id intact. Only the sentinel FAKE_RESPONSES_ID triggers deletion.
use_cases.method: _clean_item_for_openai — id field untouched when id != FAKE_RESPONSES_ID

use_cases.name: Send Normalized Request to OpenAI
use_cases.description: After normalization, the cleaned payload is sent to OpenAI via async HTTP (OpenAIResponsesModel) or WebSocket (OpenAIResponsesWSModel).

key_classes.name: OpenAIResponsesModel
key_methods: get_response(system_instructions, input, model_settings, tools, output_schema, handoffs, tracing, previous_response_id, conversation_id, prompt) -> ModelResponse

key_classes.name: OpenAIResponsesWSModel
key_classes.description: WebSocket variant; shares the same normalization logic via inherited methods

key_classes.name: fake_id.FAKE_RESPONSES_ID
key_classes.description: Sentinel constant used as a placeholder ID when no real response ID exists (e.g., responses from non-OpenAI providers)

key_classes.name: ItemHelpers
key_classes.role: Converts raw string or list inputs into a normalized list of TResponseInputItem dicts

normalization_pipeline: 3a. Early exit: if no item has provider_data, return unchanged
4. Cleaned list used in responses.create() or websocket payload
business_rules: Only items with truthy provider_data are processed (optimization: pure OpenAI conversations are never touched)
Reasoning items from other providers are fully dropped — not converted — because OpenAI reasoning is model-internal
FAKE_RESPONSES_ID ('__fake_id__') is a SDK-internal sentinel; it must never reach the OpenAI API
Real IDs (e.g., 'msg_real123') are always preserved unchanged
provider_data is a cross-provider metadata field not part of the OpenAI schema
The normalization is best-effort: it does not guarantee all cross-provider content will be accepted
item_types_handled: message — keep, strip provider_data, strip fake id
reasoning — drop if has provider_data; keep if no provider_data
other dict items — keep, strip provider_data
important_notes: This is the OpenAI Responses API (not Chat Completions). OpenAIResponsesWSModel inherits all normalization from OpenAIResponsesModel and adds WebSocket transport. The compatibility layer enables multi-provider agent conversations to be replayed through OpenAI by cleaning up traces left by other LLMs.
